# NOTE: This file needs to be regenerated by running:
#   poetry lock && poetry export -f requirements.txt --output requirements.txt
# after the poetry.lock has been updated with the secure package versions.
# The versions below reflect the minimum secure versions per Trivy vulnerability scan.
certifi>=2024.7.4
charset-normalizer>=2.0.7
idna>=3.7
requests>=2.32.4
urllib3>=2.6.3
